raw.message: 🔒 Lock on. 🎯 Fire. 💥 Destroy the enemy in real PvP matches.

hook.summary: Fast-paced aerial combat transition to a choice screen.
hook.visual_action: A jet flies through a desert canyon, then a white flash transitions to a split-screen choice between attacking a MiG-21 or an Su-25.
hook.text_overlay: MiG-21 LEVEL 5 ATTACK Su-25 LEVEL 98 ATTACK

scene_flow: Split-screen choice menu appearing with two target options.
Action sequence showing the jet destroying the target near a power plant.
Final end card with game logo and store links.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy military aviation and action-oriented combat simulators.
